records.m_Talk_ENG: This is a breaking news report from the Masshertz channel.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is a breaking news report from the Masshertz channel.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is a breaking news report from the Masshertz channel.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A mysterious spaceship has appeared near the Charade-Lotus perimeter zone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A mysterious spaceship has appeared near the Charade-Lotus perimeter zone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A mysterious spaceship has appeared near the Charade-Lotus perimeter zone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A massive spaceship, estimated at 3 kilometers across, is now hovering above the perimeter zone...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A massive spaceship, estimated at 3 kilometers across, is now hovering above the perimeter zone...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A massive spaceship, estimated at 3 kilometers across, is now hovering above the perimeter zone...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But so far, it has shown no signs of movement...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But so far, it has shown no signs of movement...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But so far, it has shown no signs of movement...

records.m_Talk_ENG: According to the Administration, authorities are aware of the spaceship's presence and have begun an investigation...
records.m_Talk_DEU: According to the Administration, authorities are aware of the spaceship's presence and have begun an investigation...
records.m_Talk_FRA: According to the Administration, authorities are aware of the spaceship's presence and have begun an investigation...

records.m_Talk_ENG: However, no official explanation has been provided at this time. As a result...
records.m_Talk_DEU: However, no official explanation has been provided at this time. As a result...
records.m_Talk_FRA: However, no official explanation has been provided at this time. As a result...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Laika, why are you just standing there like that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Laika, why are you just standing there like that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Laika, why are you just standing there like that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: L-Laika...! Are you all right...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: L-Laika...! Are you all right...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: L-Laika...! Are you all right...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: You're drenched in cold sweat! And your face is pale!
records.m_Talk_DEU: You're drenched in cold sweat! And your face is pale!
records.m_Talk_FRA: You're drenched in cold sweat! And your face is pale!

records.m_Talk_ENG:
*Huff!* *Huff!* *Huff
8v!*
records.m_Talk_DEU:
*Huff!* *Huff!* *Huff
8v!*
records.m_Talk_FRA:
*Huff!* *Huff!* *Huff
8v!*

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's it...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's it...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's it...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? What are you talking about all of a sudden?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? What are you talking about all of a sudden?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? What are you talking about all of a sudden?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's it...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's it...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's it...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Observe the phenomenon at the objective point, and research it.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Observe the phenomenon at the objective point, and research it.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Observe the phenomenon at the objective point, and research it.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: After most of the expedition team died horribly, we barely made it to the target site...
records.m_Talk_DEU: After most of the expedition team died horribly, we barely made it to the target site...
records.m_Talk_FRA: After most of the expedition team died horribly, we barely made it to the target site...

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>That</color> is what we saw there...
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>That</color> is what we saw there...
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>That</color> is what we saw there...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Th-then...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Th-then...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Th-then...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you saying that spaceship is what Laika saw in space back then?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you saying that spaceship is what Laika saw in space back then?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you saying that spaceship is what Laika saw in space back then?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Countless <color=#ffd34c>space fleets</color>, blanketing the dark side of the moon in total darkness...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Countless <color=#ffd34c>space fleets</color>, blanketing the dark side of the moon in total darkness...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Countless <color=#ffd34c>space fleets</color>, blanketing the dark side of the moon in total darkness...

records.m_Talk_ENG: And that... that's the <color=#ffd34c>mothership</color>. The one that commanded the entire fleet...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And that... that's the <color=#ffd34c>mothership</color>. The one that commanded the entire fleet...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And that... that's the <color=#ffd34c>mothership</color>. The one that commanded the entire fleet...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But... why is the mothership here...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But... why is the mothership here...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But... why is the mothership here...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Following the recent highest-level disaster alert, the sudden appearance of a spaceship has left citizens on edge.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Following the recent highest-level disaster alert, the sudden appearance of a spaceship has left citizens on edge.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Following the recent highest-level disaster alert, the sudden appearance of a spaceship has left citizens on edge.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Some speculate that it may signal alien contact or perhaps a secret new weapon developed by the Northern Union...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Some speculate that it may signal alien contact or perhaps a secret new weapon developed by the Northern Union...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Some speculate that it may signal alien contact or perhaps a secret new weapon developed by the Northern Union...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...System check's done, Tin Can.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...System check's done, Tin Can.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...System check's done, Tin Can.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know what you were doing with that body of yours during the Qliphoth Game, but maybe try taking better care of it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know what you were doing with that body of yours during the Qliphoth Game, but maybe try taking better care of it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know what you were doing with that body of yours during the Qliphoth Game, but maybe try taking better care of it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you have any idea how fragile that humanoid body is?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you have any idea how fragile that humanoid body is?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you have any idea how fragile that humanoid body is?

records.m_Talk_ENG: In raw value? We're talking astronomical.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In raw value? We're talking astronomical.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In raw value? We're talking astronomical.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Naturally, Doctor Macy.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Naturally, Doctor Macy.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Naturally, Doctor Macy.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's precisely why I entrust this body to you and no one else.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's precisely why I entrust this body to you and no one else.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's precisely why I entrust this body to you and no one else.

records.m_Talk_ENG: To the very person who actually built this body.
records.m_Talk_DEU: To the very person who actually built this body.
records.m_Talk_FRA: To the very person who actually built this body.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, shut up.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, shut up.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, shut up.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Quit pretending to be human when you're clearly not.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Quit pretending to be human when you're clearly not.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Quit pretending to be human when you're clearly not.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. My apologies if I offended you, Doctor.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. My apologies if I offended you, Doctor.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. My apologies if I offended you, Doctor.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But surely, you must be aware of it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But surely, you must be aware of it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But surely, you must be aware of it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Who really holds authority at the Future-at-War research foundation?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Who really holds authority at the Future-at-War research foundation?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Who really holds authority at the Future-at-War research foundation?

records.m_Talk_ENG: And who was behind the recovery of the Lost Ship, Simurgh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And who was behind the recovery of the Lost Ship, Simurgh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And who was behind the recovery of the Lost Ship, Simurgh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, of course!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, of course!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, of course!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why, it's all thanks to our glorious chairman, isn't it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why, it's all thanks to our glorious chairman, isn't it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why, it's all thanks to our glorious chairman, isn't it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Did you expect me to say something like this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Did you expect me to say something like this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Did you expect me to say something like this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: So that was all just a setup to rope me into the Council, huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So that was all just a setup to rope me into the Council, huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So that was all just a setup to rope me into the Council, huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What if I refuse to help you? Then what?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What if I refuse to help you? Then what?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What if I refuse to help you? Then what?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Doctor, I already know what your answer will be.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Doctor, I already know what your answer will be.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Doctor, I already know what your answer will be.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, shut up! I know it too, you smug Tin Can!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, shut up! I know it too, you smug Tin Can!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, shut up! I know it too, you smug Tin Can!

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I've got to say this, no matter what.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I've got to say this, no matter what.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I've got to say this, no matter what.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Listen up. I don't trust Terrabrains including you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Listen up. I don't trust Terrabrains including you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Listen up. I don't trust Terrabrains including you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even so, there's only one reason I'm going along with this plan.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even so, there's only one reason I'm going along with this plan.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even so, there's only one reason I'm going along with this plan.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If Commander were here... she'd make the same choice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If Commander were here... she'd make the same choice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If Commander were here... she'd make the same choice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Someone who willingly went into space to save everyone wouldn't just look away.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Someone who willingly went into space to save everyone wouldn't just look away.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Someone who willingly went into space to save everyone wouldn't just look away.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So don't get the wrong idea, you arrogant Tin Can.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So don't get the wrong idea, you arrogant Tin Can.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So don't get the wrong idea, you arrogant Tin Can.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not here to help you. I'm just doing what I can, just like she would have...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not here to help you. I'm just doing what I can, just like she would have...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not here to help you. I'm just doing what I can, just like she would have...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... I understand how you feel.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... I understand how you feel.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... I understand how you feel.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And don't worry too much, Doctor.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And don't worry too much, Doctor.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And don't worry too much, Doctor.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just as you chose to carry on Commander Alice's will...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just as you chose to carry on Commander Alice's will...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just as you chose to carry on Commander Alice's will...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've run every calculation the Council could manage, for my Father's sake.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've run every calculation the Council could manage, for my Father's sake.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've run every calculation the Council could manage, for my Father's sake.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Every calculation, huh?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Every calculation, huh?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Every calculation, huh?

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh...*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh...*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh...*

records.m_Talk_ENG: Richard's death wasn't that long ago, and now we've got another incident on our hands.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Richard's death wasn't that long ago, and now we've got another incident on our hands.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Richard's death wasn't that long ago, and now we've got another incident on our hands.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Supreme Administrator, who was supposed to be in Lotus, suddenly ran off to the Northern Union territory...
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Supreme Administrator, who was supposed to be in Lotus, suddenly ran off to the Northern Union territory...
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Supreme Administrator, who was supposed to be in Lotus, suddenly ran off to the Northern Union territory...

records.m_Talk_ENG: That hermit Senior who's supposed to be working with us is unreachable...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That hermit Senior who's supposed to be working with us is unreachable...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That hermit Senior who's supposed to be working with us is unreachable...

records.m_Talk_ENG: And Senior Jackson, who usually jumps at this kind of sci-fi nonsense, is conveniently missing...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And Senior Jackson, who usually jumps at this kind of sci-fi nonsense, is conveniently missing...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And Senior Jackson, who usually jumps at this kind of sci-fi nonsense, is conveniently missing...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now it's all falling on me, the acting head of Charade...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now it's all falling on me, the acting head of Charade...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now it's all falling on me, the acting head of Charade...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Argh! This is all the Supreme Administrator's fault!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Argh! This is all the Supreme Administrator's fault!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Argh! This is all the Supreme Administrator's fault!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just wait! Once this is over, I will get some answers!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just wait! Once this is over, I will get some answers!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just wait! Once this is over, I will get some answers!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Two scout squads have been positioned as instructed, ma'am.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Two scout squads have been positioned as instructed, ma'am.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Two scout squads have been positioned as instructed, ma'am.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're ready to move in on your command.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're ready to move in on your command.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're ready to move in on your command.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Good. Listen up, everyone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Good. Listen up, everyone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Good. Listen up, everyone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This operation is a recon and intel-gathering mission targeting the unidentified aircraft that appeared over the perimeter zone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This operation is a recon and intel-gathering mission targeting the unidentified aircraft that appeared over the perimeter zone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This operation is a recon and intel-gathering mission targeting the unidentified aircraft that appeared over the perimeter zone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sweep the area and collect as much data as possible on the aircraft.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sweep the area and collect as much data as possible on the aircraft.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sweep the area and collect as much data as possible on the aircraft.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's been 70 hours since it showed up, and it hasn't made a single move by just floating there.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's been 70 hours since it showed up, and it hasn't made a single move by just floating there.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's been 70 hours since it showed up, and it hasn't made a single move by just floating there.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Based on that, we're assuming it's not hostile... at least for now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Based on that, we're assuming it's not hostile... at least for now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Based on that, we're assuming it's not hostile... at least for now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Approach with extreme caution, and report any unusual activity immediately.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Approach with extreme caution, and report any unusual activity immediately.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Approach with extreme caution, and report any unusual activity immediately.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This could be a crisis unlike anything humanity has ever encountered.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This could be a crisis unlike anything humanity has ever encountered.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This could be a crisis unlike anything humanity has ever encountered.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We don't know what could happen, so stay sharp and proceed with caution.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We don't know what could happen, so stay sharp and proceed with caution.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We don't know what could happen, so stay sharp and proceed with caution.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Understood!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Understood!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Understood!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Scout squads, Alpha and Bravo, begin your operation!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Scout squads, Alpha and Bravo, begin your operation!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Scout squads, Alpha and Bravo, begin your operation!

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is Alpha.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is Alpha.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is Alpha.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We've reached the area directly beneath the unidentified aircraft.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We've reached the area directly beneath the unidentified aircraft.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We've reached the area directly beneath the unidentified aircraft.

records.m_Talk_ENG: All clear so far. As for the Corruption ray level...
records.m_Talk_DEU: All clear so far. As for the Corruption ray level...
records.m_Talk_FRA: All clear so far. As for the Corruption ray level...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Alpha, is something wrong?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Alpha, is something wrong?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Alpha, is something wrong?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Bravo, wasn't this area classified as a CSE Lv. 2 Corrupted Area?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Bravo, wasn't this area classified as a CSE Lv. 2 Corrupted Area?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Bravo, wasn't this area classified as a CSE Lv. 2 Corrupted Area?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know why, but the closer we get to the center of the aircraft, the weaker the Corruption ray is becoming.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know why, but the closer we get to the center of the aircraft, the weaker the Corruption ray is becoming.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know why, but the closer we get to the center of the aircraft, the weaker the Corruption ray is becoming.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you saying?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you saying?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you saying?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you suggesting... that spaceship is purifying the Corruption ray?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you suggesting... that spaceship is purifying the Corruption ray?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you suggesting... that spaceship is purifying the Corruption ray?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's...
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's...
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's...

records.m_Talk_ENG: AHHHHHHHHH!
records.m_Talk_DEU: AHHHHHHHHH!
records.m_Talk_FRA: AHHHHHHHHH!

records.m_Talk_ENG: R-run for it!! Full retreat!
records.m_Talk_DEU: R-run for it!! Full retreat!
records.m_Talk_FRA: R-run for it!! Full retreat!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Alpha, what's going on?! Alpha, respond!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Alpha, what's going on?! Alpha, respond!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Alpha, what's going on?! Alpha, respond!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone, stay on high alert! Team Alpha's been hit!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone, stay on high alert! Team Alpha's been hit!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone, stay on high alert! Team Alpha's been hit!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Someone, get a message to the Senior...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Someone, get a message to the Senior...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Someone, get a message to the Senior...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Commander! We're detecting a dimension jump signal in front.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Commander! We're detecting a dimension jump signal in front.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Commander! We're detecting a dimension jump signal in front.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The identification signal... it's from the Administration!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The identification signal... it's from the Administration!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The identification signal... it's from the Administration!

records.m_Talk_ENG: A dimensional jump from the Administration? That's impossible! This was supposed to be a small-scale recon operation!
records.m_Talk_DEU: A dimensional jump from the Administration? That's impossible! This was supposed to be a small-scale recon operation!
records.m_Talk_FRA: A dimensional jump from the Administration? That's impossible! This was supposed to be a small-scale recon operation!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We never called in a dimensional ship!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We never called in a dimensional ship!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We never called in a dimensional ship!

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Organic beings detected. Checking vital signs.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Organic beings detected. Checking vital signs.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Organic beings detected. Checking vital signs.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: W-what is... that...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: W-what is... that...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: W-what is... that...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Vital signs checked. Unable to verify Corruption Syndrome symptoms.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Vital signs checked. Unable to verify Corruption Syndrome symptoms.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Vital signs checked. Unable to verify Corruption Syndrome symptoms.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>The chances of Corruption. Unable to verify.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>The chances of Corruption. Unable to verify.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>The chances of Corruption. Unable to verify.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Eliminating hostile entity.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Eliminating hostile entity.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Eliminating hostile entity.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Incoming! All units, spread out!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Incoming! All units, spread out!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Incoming! All units, spread out!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's no use. Moderators are tough to stop unless you've got Counters' CRF.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's no use. Moderators are tough to stop unless you've got Counters' CRF.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's no use. Moderators are tough to stop unless you've got Counters' CRF.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So how about you all duck and let us handle this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So how about you all duck and let us handle this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So how about you all duck and let us handle this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Y-you are...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Y-you are...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Y-you are...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Repairing damage. Ready to engage.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Repairing damage. Ready to engage.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Repairing damage. Ready to engage.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>New organic beings detected. Checking vital signs.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>New organic beings detected. Checking vital signs.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>New organic beings detected. Checking vital signs.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yegor, has it really been 20 years since we last saw these beetles?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yegor, has it really been 20 years since we last saw these beetles?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yegor, has it really been 20 years since we last saw these beetles?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That would be accurate, Deputy Commander.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That would be accurate, Deputy Commander.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That would be accurate, Deputy Commander.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Though technically, most of that time we were frozen in temporal suspension.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Though technically, most of that time we were frozen in temporal suspension.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Though technically, most of that time we were frozen in temporal suspension.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, that's right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, that's right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, that's right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Sure, times have changed... but you haven't forgotten how to hunt beetles, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Sure, times have changed... but you haven't forgotten how to hunt beetles, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Sure, times have changed... but you haven't forgotten how to hunt beetles, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course not.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course not.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course not.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Commence bombardment of the ten Estaque cannons!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Commence bombardment of the ten Estaque cannons!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Commence bombardment of the ten Estaque cannons!

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Activating active defense system. Deploying energy resonance shield.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Activating active defense system. Deploying energy resonance shield.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Activating active defense system. Deploying energy resonance shield.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Switching to Elimination mode. Prioritizing armored vehicles.</color>
records.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Switching to Elimination mode. Prioritizing armored vehicles.</color>
records.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Switching to Elimination mode. Prioritizing armored vehicles.</color>

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now's our chance! The Moderator's switched targets.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now's our chance! The Moderator's switched targets.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now's our chance! The Moderator's switched targets.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Let's move, Deputy Commander! I'll cover you!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Let's move, Deputy Commander! I'll cover you!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Let's move, Deputy Commander! I'll cover you!

records.m_Talk_ENG: All right then. I'm counting on you, Yegor.
records.m_Talk_DEU: All right then. I'm counting on you, Yegor.
records.m_Talk_FRA: All right then. I'm counting on you, Yegor.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Alex, just a heads-up. Don't push yourself too hard.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Alex, just a heads-up. Don't push yourself too hard.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Alex, just a heads-up. Don't push yourself too hard.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even with the suit assisting you, your regeneration procedure isn't fully reliable yet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even with the suit assisting you, your regeneration procedure isn't fully reliable yet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even with the suit assisting you, your regeneration procedure isn't fully reliable yet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: 10 minutes...
records.m_Talk_DEU: 10 minutes...
records.m_Talk_FRA: 10 minutes...

records.m_Talk_ENG: For now, assume that's your upper limit and act accordingly.
records.m_Talk_DEU: For now, assume that's your upper limit and act accordingly.
records.m_Talk_FRA: For now, assume that's your upper limit and act accordingly.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ten minutes, huh? Well, dragging things out is never fun anyway.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ten minutes, huh? Well, dragging things out is never fun anyway.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ten minutes, huh? Well, dragging things out is never fun anyway.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry, Vice President.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry, Vice President.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry, Vice President.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Today's battlefield is part rehab, part field test for the new gear.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Today's battlefield is part rehab, part field test for the new gear.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Today's battlefield is part rehab, part field test for the new gear.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is a breaking news report from the Masshertz channel.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is a breaking news report from the Masshertz channel.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is a breaking news report from the Masshertz channel.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A mysterious spaceship has appeared near the Charade-Lotus perimeter zone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: A mysterious spaceship has appeared near the Charade-Lotus perimeter zone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: A mysterious spaceship has appeared near the Charade-Lotus perimeter zone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: A massive spaceship, estimated at 3 kilometers across, is now hovering above the perimeter zone...
root.m_Talk_DEU: A massive spaceship, estimated at 3 kilometers across, is now hovering above the perimeter zone...
root.m_Talk_FRA: A massive spaceship, estimated at 3 kilometers across, is now hovering above the perimeter zone...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But so far, it has shown no signs of movement...
root.m_Talk_DEU: But so far, it has shown no signs of movement...
root.m_Talk_FRA: But so far, it has shown no signs of movement...

root.m_Talk_ENG: According to the Administration, authorities are aware of the spaceship's presence and have begun an investigation...
root.m_Talk_DEU: According to the Administration, authorities are aware of the spaceship's presence and have begun an investigation...
root.m_Talk_FRA: According to the Administration, authorities are aware of the spaceship's presence and have begun an investigation...

root.m_Talk_ENG: However, no official explanation has been provided at this time. As a result...
root.m_Talk_DEU: However, no official explanation has been provided at this time. As a result...
root.m_Talk_FRA: However, no official explanation has been provided at this time. As a result...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Laika, why are you just standing there like that?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Laika, why are you just standing there like that?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Laika, why are you just standing there like that?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ugh...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ugh...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ugh...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: L-Laika...! Are you all right...?!
root.m_Talk_DEU: L-Laika...! Are you all right...?!
root.m_Talk_FRA: L-Laika...! Are you all right...?!

root.m_Talk_ENG: You're drenched in cold sweat! And your face is pale!
root.m_Talk_DEU: You're drenched in cold sweat! And your face is pale!
root.m_Talk_FRA: You're drenched in cold sweat! And your face is pale!

root.m_Talk_ENG:
*Huff!* *Huff!* *Huff
8v!*
root.m_Talk_DEU:
*Huff!* *Huff!* *Huff
8v!*
root.m_Talk_FRA:
*Huff!* *Huff!* *Huff
8v!*

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's it...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's it...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's it...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? What are you talking about all of a sudden?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? What are you talking about all of a sudden?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? What are you talking about all of a sudden?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's it...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's it...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's it...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>Observe the phenomenon at the objective point, and research it.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>Observe the phenomenon at the objective point, and research it.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>Observe the phenomenon at the objective point, and research it.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: After most of the expedition team died horribly, we barely made it to the target site...
root.m_Talk_DEU: After most of the expedition team died horribly, we barely made it to the target site...
root.m_Talk_FRA: After most of the expedition team died horribly, we barely made it to the target site...

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ffd34c>That</color> is what we saw there...
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ffd34c>That</color> is what we saw there...
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ffd34c>That</color> is what we saw there...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Th-then...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Th-then...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Th-then...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you saying that spaceship is what Laika saw in space back then?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you saying that spaceship is what Laika saw in space back then?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you saying that spaceship is what Laika saw in space back then?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Countless <color=#ffd34c>space fleets</color>, blanketing the dark side of the moon in total darkness...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Countless <color=#ffd34c>space fleets</color>, blanketing the dark side of the moon in total darkness...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Countless <color=#ffd34c>space fleets</color>, blanketing the dark side of the moon in total darkness...

root.m_Talk_ENG: And that... that's the <color=#ffd34c>mothership</color>. The one that commanded the entire fleet...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And that... that's the <color=#ffd34c>mothership</color>. The one that commanded the entire fleet...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And that... that's the <color=#ffd34c>mothership</color>. The one that commanded the entire fleet...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But... why is the mothership here...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: But... why is the mothership here...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: But... why is the mothership here...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Following the recent highest-level disaster alert, the sudden appearance of a spaceship has left citizens on edge.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Following the recent highest-level disaster alert, the sudden appearance of a spaceship has left citizens on edge.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Following the recent highest-level disaster alert, the sudden appearance of a spaceship has left citizens on edge.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Some speculate that it may signal alien contact or perhaps a secret new weapon developed by the Northern Union...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Some speculate that it may signal alien contact or perhaps a secret new weapon developed by the Northern Union...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Some speculate that it may signal alien contact or perhaps a secret new weapon developed by the Northern Union...

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...System check's done, Tin Can.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...System check's done, Tin Can.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...System check's done, Tin Can.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know what you were doing with that body of yours during the Qliphoth Game, but maybe try taking better care of it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know what you were doing with that body of yours during the Qliphoth Game, but maybe try taking better care of it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know what you were doing with that body of yours during the Qliphoth Game, but maybe try taking better care of it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Do you have any idea how fragile that humanoid body is?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Do you have any idea how fragile that humanoid body is?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Do you have any idea how fragile that humanoid body is?

root.m_Talk_ENG: In raw value? We're talking astronomical.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In raw value? We're talking astronomical.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In raw value? We're talking astronomical.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Naturally, Doctor Macy.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Naturally, Doctor Macy.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Naturally, Doctor Macy.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's precisely why I entrust this body to you and no one else.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's precisely why I entrust this body to you and no one else.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's precisely why I entrust this body to you and no one else.

root.m_Talk_ENG: To the very person who actually built this body.
root.m_Talk_DEU: To the very person who actually built this body.
root.m_Talk_FRA: To the very person who actually built this body.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, shut up.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, shut up.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, shut up.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Quit pretending to be human when you're clearly not.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Quit pretending to be human when you're clearly not.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Quit pretending to be human when you're clearly not.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. My apologies if I offended you, Doctor.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. My apologies if I offended you, Doctor.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. My apologies if I offended you, Doctor.

root.m_Talk_ENG: But surely, you must be aware of it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But surely, you must be aware of it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But surely, you must be aware of it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Who really holds authority at the Future-at-War research foundation?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Who really holds authority at the Future-at-War research foundation?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Who really holds authority at the Future-at-War research foundation?

root.m_Talk_ENG: And who was behind the recovery of the Lost Ship, Simurgh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: And who was behind the recovery of the Lost Ship, Simurgh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: And who was behind the recovery of the Lost Ship, Simurgh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, of course!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, of course!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, of course!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Why, it's all thanks to our glorious chairman, isn't it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Why, it's all thanks to our glorious chairman, isn't it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Why, it's all thanks to our glorious chairman, isn't it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Did you expect me to say something like this?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Did you expect me to say something like this?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Did you expect me to say something like this?

root.m_Talk_ENG: So that was all just a setup to rope me into the Council, huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: So that was all just a setup to rope me into the Council, huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: So that was all just a setup to rope me into the Council, huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: What if I refuse to help you? Then what?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What if I refuse to help you? Then what?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What if I refuse to help you? Then what?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Doctor, I already know what your answer will be.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Doctor, I already know what your answer will be.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Doctor, I already know what your answer will be.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, shut up! I know it too, you smug Tin Can!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, shut up! I know it too, you smug Tin Can!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, shut up! I know it too, you smug Tin Can!

root.m_Talk_ENG: But I've got to say this, no matter what.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But I've got to say this, no matter what.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But I've got to say this, no matter what.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Listen up. I don't trust Terrabrains including you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Listen up. I don't trust Terrabrains including you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Listen up. I don't trust Terrabrains including you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even so, there's only one reason I'm going along with this plan.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even so, there's only one reason I'm going along with this plan.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even so, there's only one reason I'm going along with this plan.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If Commander were here... she'd make the same choice.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If Commander were here... she'd make the same choice.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If Commander were here... she'd make the same choice.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Someone who willingly went into space to save everyone wouldn't just look away.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Someone who willingly went into space to save everyone wouldn't just look away.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Someone who willingly went into space to save everyone wouldn't just look away.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So don't get the wrong idea, you arrogant Tin Can.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So don't get the wrong idea, you arrogant Tin Can.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So don't get the wrong idea, you arrogant Tin Can.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'm not here to help you. I'm just doing what I can, just like she would have...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'm not here to help you. I'm just doing what I can, just like she would have...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'm not here to help you. I'm just doing what I can, just like she would have...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha... I understand how you feel.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha... I understand how you feel.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha... I understand how you feel.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And don't worry too much, Doctor.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And don't worry too much, Doctor.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And don't worry too much, Doctor.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just as you chose to carry on Commander Alice's will...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just as you chose to carry on Commander Alice's will...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just as you chose to carry on Commander Alice's will...

root.m_Talk_ENG: I've run every calculation the Council could manage, for my Father's sake.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I've run every calculation the Council could manage, for my Father's sake.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I've run every calculation the Council could manage, for my Father's sake.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Every calculation, huh?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Every calculation, huh?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Every calculation, huh?

root.m_Talk_ENG: *Sigh...*
root.m_Talk_DEU: *Sigh...*
root.m_Talk_FRA: *Sigh...*

root.m_Talk_ENG: Richard's death wasn't that long ago, and now we've got another incident on our hands.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Richard's death wasn't that long ago, and now we've got another incident on our hands.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Richard's death wasn't that long ago, and now we've got another incident on our hands.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The Supreme Administrator, who was supposed to be in Lotus, suddenly ran off to the Northern Union territory...
root.m_Talk_DEU: The Supreme Administrator, who was supposed to be in Lotus, suddenly ran off to the Northern Union territory...
root.m_Talk_FRA: The Supreme Administrator, who was supposed to be in Lotus, suddenly ran off to the Northern Union territory...

root.m_Talk_ENG: That hermit Senior who's supposed to be working with us is unreachable...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That hermit Senior who's supposed to be working with us is unreachable...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That hermit Senior who's supposed to be working with us is unreachable...

root.m_Talk_ENG: And Senior Jackson, who usually jumps at this kind of sci-fi nonsense, is conveniently missing...
root.m_Talk_DEU: And Senior Jackson, who usually jumps at this kind of sci-fi nonsense, is conveniently missing...
root.m_Talk_FRA: And Senior Jackson, who usually jumps at this kind of sci-fi nonsense, is conveniently missing...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now it's all falling on me, the acting head of Charade...!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now it's all falling on me, the acting head of Charade...!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now it's all falling on me, the acting head of Charade...!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Argh! This is all the Supreme Administrator's fault!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Argh! This is all the Supreme Administrator's fault!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Argh! This is all the Supreme Administrator's fault!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Just wait! Once this is over, I will get some answers!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Just wait! Once this is over, I will get some answers!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Just wait! Once this is over, I will get some answers!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Two scout squads have been positioned as instructed, ma'am.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Two scout squads have been positioned as instructed, ma'am.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Two scout squads have been positioned as instructed, ma'am.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We're ready to move in on your command.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We're ready to move in on your command.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We're ready to move in on your command.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Good. Listen up, everyone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Good. Listen up, everyone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Good. Listen up, everyone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This operation is a recon and intel-gathering mission targeting the unidentified aircraft that appeared over the perimeter zone.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This operation is a recon and intel-gathering mission targeting the unidentified aircraft that appeared over the perimeter zone.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This operation is a recon and intel-gathering mission targeting the unidentified aircraft that appeared over the perimeter zone.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sweep the area and collect as much data as possible on the aircraft.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sweep the area and collect as much data as possible on the aircraft.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sweep the area and collect as much data as possible on the aircraft.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's been 70 hours since it showed up, and it hasn't made a single move by just floating there.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's been 70 hours since it showed up, and it hasn't made a single move by just floating there.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's been 70 hours since it showed up, and it hasn't made a single move by just floating there.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Based on that, we're assuming it's not hostile... at least for now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Based on that, we're assuming it's not hostile... at least for now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Based on that, we're assuming it's not hostile... at least for now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Approach with extreme caution, and report any unusual activity immediately.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Approach with extreme caution, and report any unusual activity immediately.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Approach with extreme caution, and report any unusual activity immediately.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This could be a crisis unlike anything humanity has ever encountered.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This could be a crisis unlike anything humanity has ever encountered.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This could be a crisis unlike anything humanity has ever encountered.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We don't know what could happen, so stay sharp and proceed with caution.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We don't know what could happen, so stay sharp and proceed with caution.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We don't know what could happen, so stay sharp and proceed with caution.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Understood!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Understood!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Understood!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Scout squads, Alpha and Bravo, begin your operation!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Scout squads, Alpha and Bravo, begin your operation!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Scout squads, Alpha and Bravo, begin your operation!

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is Alpha.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is Alpha.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is Alpha.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We've reached the area directly beneath the unidentified aircraft.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We've reached the area directly beneath the unidentified aircraft.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We've reached the area directly beneath the unidentified aircraft.

root.m_Talk_ENG: All clear so far. As for the Corruption ray level...
root.m_Talk_DEU: All clear so far. As for the Corruption ray level...
root.m_Talk_FRA: All clear so far. As for the Corruption ray level...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Alpha, is something wrong?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Alpha, is something wrong?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Alpha, is something wrong?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Bravo, wasn't this area classified as a CSE Lv. 2 Corrupted Area?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Bravo, wasn't this area classified as a CSE Lv. 2 Corrupted Area?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Bravo, wasn't this area classified as a CSE Lv. 2 Corrupted Area?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know why, but the closer we get to the center of the aircraft, the weaker the Corruption ray is becoming.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know why, but the closer we get to the center of the aircraft, the weaker the Corruption ray is becoming.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know why, but the closer we get to the center of the aircraft, the weaker the Corruption ray is becoming.

root.m_Talk_ENG: What are you saying?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What are you saying?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What are you saying?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you suggesting... that spaceship is purifying the Corruption ray?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you suggesting... that spaceship is purifying the Corruption ray?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you suggesting... that spaceship is purifying the Corruption ray?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's...
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's...
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's...

root.m_Talk_ENG: AHHHHHHHHH!
root.m_Talk_DEU: AHHHHHHHHH!
root.m_Talk_FRA: AHHHHHHHHH!

root.m_Talk_ENG: R-run for it!! Full retreat!
root.m_Talk_DEU: R-run for it!! Full retreat!
root.m_Talk_FRA: R-run for it!! Full retreat!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Alpha, what's going on?! Alpha, respond!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Alpha, what's going on?! Alpha, respond!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Alpha, what's going on?! Alpha, respond!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone, stay on high alert! Team Alpha's been hit!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone, stay on high alert! Team Alpha's been hit!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone, stay on high alert! Team Alpha's been hit!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Someone, get a message to the Senior...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Someone, get a message to the Senior...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Someone, get a message to the Senior...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Commander! We're detecting a dimension jump signal in front.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Commander! We're detecting a dimension jump signal in front.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Commander! We're detecting a dimension jump signal in front.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The identification signal... it's from the Administration!
root.m_Talk_DEU: The identification signal... it's from the Administration!
root.m_Talk_FRA: The identification signal... it's from the Administration!

root.m_Talk_ENG: A dimensional jump from the Administration? That's impossible! This was supposed to be a small-scale recon operation!
root.m_Talk_DEU: A dimensional jump from the Administration? That's impossible! This was supposed to be a small-scale recon operation!
root.m_Talk_FRA: A dimensional jump from the Administration? That's impossible! This was supposed to be a small-scale recon operation!

root.m_Talk_ENG: We never called in a dimensional ship!
root.m_Talk_DEU: We never called in a dimensional ship!
root.m_Talk_FRA: We never called in a dimensional ship!

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Organic beings detected. Checking vital signs.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Organic beings detected. Checking vital signs.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Organic beings detected. Checking vital signs.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: W-what is... that...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: W-what is... that...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: W-what is... that...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Vital signs checked. Unable to verify Corruption Syndrome symptoms.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Vital signs checked. Unable to verify Corruption Syndrome symptoms.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Vital signs checked. Unable to verify Corruption Syndrome symptoms.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>The chances of Corruption. Unable to verify.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>The chances of Corruption. Unable to verify.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>The chances of Corruption. Unable to verify.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Eliminating hostile entity.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Eliminating hostile entity.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Eliminating hostile entity.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: Incoming! All units, spread out!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Incoming! All units, spread out!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Incoming! All units, spread out!

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's no use. Moderators are tough to stop unless you've got Counters' CRF.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's no use. Moderators are tough to stop unless you've got Counters' CRF.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's no use. Moderators are tough to stop unless you've got Counters' CRF.

root.m_Talk_ENG: So how about you all duck and let us handle this.
root.m_Talk_DEU: So how about you all duck and let us handle this.
root.m_Talk_FRA: So how about you all duck and let us handle this.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Y-you are...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Y-you are...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Y-you are...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Repairing damage. Ready to engage.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Repairing damage. Ready to engage.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Repairing damage. Ready to engage.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>New organic beings detected. Checking vital signs.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>New organic beings detected. Checking vital signs.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>New organic beings detected. Checking vital signs.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yegor, has it really been 20 years since we last saw these beetles?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yegor, has it really been 20 years since we last saw these beetles?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yegor, has it really been 20 years since we last saw these beetles?

root.m_Talk_ENG: That would be accurate, Deputy Commander.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That would be accurate, Deputy Commander.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That would be accurate, Deputy Commander.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Though technically, most of that time we were frozen in temporal suspension.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Though technically, most of that time we were frozen in temporal suspension.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Though technically, most of that time we were frozen in temporal suspension.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha, that's right.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha, that's right.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha, that's right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Sure, times have changed... but you haven't forgotten how to hunt beetles, right?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Sure, times have changed... but you haven't forgotten how to hunt beetles, right?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Sure, times have changed... but you haven't forgotten how to hunt beetles, right?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course not.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course not.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course not.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Commence bombardment of the ten Estaque cannons!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Commence bombardment of the ten Estaque cannons!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Commence bombardment of the ten Estaque cannons!

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Activating active defense system. Deploying energy resonance shield.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Activating active defense system. Deploying energy resonance shield.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Activating active defense system. Deploying energy resonance shield.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: <color=#ff3636>Switching to Elimination mode. Prioritizing armored vehicles.</color>
root.m_Talk_DEU: <color=#ff3636>Switching to Elimination mode. Prioritizing armored vehicles.</color>
root.m_Talk_FRA: <color=#ff3636>Switching to Elimination mode. Prioritizing armored vehicles.</color>

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now's our chance! The Moderator's switched targets.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now's our chance! The Moderator's switched targets.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now's our chance! The Moderator's switched targets.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Let's move, Deputy Commander! I'll cover you!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Let's move, Deputy Commander! I'll cover you!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Let's move, Deputy Commander! I'll cover you!

root.m_Talk_ENG: All right then. I'm counting on you, Yegor.
root.m_Talk_DEU: All right then. I'm counting on you, Yegor.
root.m_Talk_FRA: All right then. I'm counting on you, Yegor.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Alex, just a heads-up. Don't push yourself too hard.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Alex, just a heads-up. Don't push yourself too hard.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Alex, just a heads-up. Don't push yourself too hard.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Even with the suit assisting you, your regeneration procedure isn't fully reliable yet.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Even with the suit assisting you, your regeneration procedure isn't fully reliable yet.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Even with the suit assisting you, your regeneration procedure isn't fully reliable yet.

root.m_Talk_ENG: 10 minutes...
root.m_Talk_DEU: 10 minutes...
root.m_Talk_FRA: 10 minutes...

root.m_Talk_ENG: For now, assume that's your upper limit and act accordingly.
root.m_Talk_DEU: For now, assume that's your upper limit and act accordingly.
root.m_Talk_FRA: For now, assume that's your upper limit and act accordingly.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Ten minutes, huh? Well, dragging things out is never fun anyway.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Ten minutes, huh? Well, dragging things out is never fun anyway.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Ten minutes, huh? Well, dragging things out is never fun anyway.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry, Vice President.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry, Vice President.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry, Vice President.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Today's battlefield is part rehab, part field test for the new gear.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Today's battlefield is part rehab, part field test for the new gear.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Today's battlefield is part rehab, part field test for the new gear.
